title: flavorful and fattening spanish pandan-leaf-infused oil and paella rice paella
description: a rich and savory spanish dish featuring pandan-leaf infused oil and paella rice, perfect for a special occasion
instructions: heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
add the chicken thighs and cook until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes.
remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
add the shrimp to the pan and cook until pink and just cooked through, about 2-3 minutes.
remove the shrimp from the pan and set aside with the chicken.
add the garlic, safron threads, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
add the chicken broth and red wine to the pan and bring to a boil.
add the paella rice to the pan and stir to coat the rice in the liquid.
add the browned chicken and shrimp back to the pan and stir to combine.
reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
remove the pan from the heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley and a squeeze of lemon juice.
